author: Kuhn & Rueß GmbH
description: PowerShell-based, Nagios/MRPE compatible ping check for Windows hosts. Ships check_ping.ps1 (uses Test-Connection to ping a given hostname and returns a classic Nagios status line with rta/pl/rtmin/rtmax perf data) plus a thin check_ping.cmd wrapper so the MRPE config does not need to spell out the full powershell.exe path or worry about quoting. Intended to be deployed via the Agent Bakery rule "Deploy custom files with agent rules" and invoked through MRPE or a local check.
name: windows_ping
title: Windows Ping (MRPE/Nagios compatible PowerShell check)
